CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products changes, the Q UID is updated and a row is added to this table.  
The third column specifies which sections or sub-sections have been updated. The fourth column 
should mention the version of the product to which the change applies.  The validation (see last 
column in the table) means the document was checked for contents, formats and consistency with 
other documents. 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated, and a row is added to this table.

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document (QUID) for Sea Ice products, detailing the production system description, validation framework, and results for Arctic and Antarctic sea ice concentration charts.
